reviews.text: Ethan did a wonderful job from figuring out why there was a multi-year problem with the water heater to determining how to solve it to doing all of that work plus making other improvements in a very timely and organized way.  I wish that I had met him a few years ago!  That said, the system is perfect now.  I would give Ethan and his company Complete Home Comfort Solutions 100 stars if possible!

I can't say enough great things about my experiences with Complete Home Comfort. They have been servicing my HVAC system for quite some time, they consistently demonstrated professionalism, honesty, and a true commitment to quality work. It's rare to find a company that you can fully trust in your home. Extremely knowledgeable and easily able to explain everything in a way that was not hard to understand.

When it finally came time to replace my system, I honestly didn't even consider calling anyone else. The entire process—from initial evaluation to final installation—was handled seamlessly. There was no pressure, no confusion, just clear communication and genuine guidance every step of the way.

Ethan, the owner, was exceptional to work with. He went above and beyond to make sure I understood all of my options and took the time to design a solution that truly fit my home and needs. What stood out most was how much he cared—not just about making a sale, but about delivering long-term comfort and value. He made me feel confident that every dollar I spent was going toward a complete, high-quality comfort system, not just a basic replacement.

The workmanship was top-notch, and the materials they used were clearly high quality. The installation was detail-oriented, and left everything cleaner than they found it. Since the install, the improvement in comfort, efficiency, and overall performance has been incredible—you can genuinely feel the difference.

If you're looking for an HVAC company that combines expertise, integrity, and outstanding customer care, I wholeheartedly recommend Complete Home Comfort. They exceeded my expectations in every way, and I wouldn't trust anyone else with my home.

Ethan did an outstanding job installing a brand new dual fuel HVAC system in my property. The space was tight and not the easiest to work in, but he handled everything professionally and efficiently. He removed the old unit and completed the full install in a single day.

The system runs extremely quietly and has been working flawlessly. The dual fuel setup with heat pump and gas backup has already made a noticeable difference in efficiency and overall comfort.

Pricing was very fair, communication was great, and the quality of work speaks for itself. It is hard to find someone reliable who shows up, works hard, and gets the job done right. Ethan does all three.

Highly recommend!

We got to work with CHC via Pearl Edison for our dual heat pump project (one dedicated to upstairs with mini-splits, one that serves a more traditional A/C type function) that expanded to include a furnace swap (so it would play nicely with the heat pump).

We had a really great experience with Ethan - he was punctual, personable, respected the property (shoe covers, uses equipment that minimizes mess even when drilling through plaster and brick, and cleaned up really well), and communicated effectively. The finished work is clean, tidy, and professional.

He took the time to educate us on our new equipment, advised on some trade-offs between a platform-native thermostat vs. 3rd party smart options, and gave advice on cost-effective filter sourcing.

Our new system is working great! We've worked with a few other contractors this year on other things, and they could really learn from Ethan's example in professionalism!

We recommend CHC and look forward to working with him in the future if the need arises.

Ethan as a hero for us. After we had a nightmare encounter with another HVAC contractor who won't be named, we called him on a strong recommendation from the real estate agent that helped us buy our priority. Ethan did a full diagnosis of our commercial HVAC unit, and listed out a few small parts that needed to be replaced. When it was clear that we wouldn't be able to get the OEM versions of these parts for several days, Ethan brainstormed on acceptable short-term replacements that would get our system going immediately. This type of problem solving is rare to find in Pittsburgh contractors. We'll absolutely be leaning on Ethan and his team in the future for all our HVAC needs.

10/10 would recommend. Had Ethan at Complete Home Comfort do a whole house system for me (heat pump, back-up furnace, full duct work) and not only did he complete it in a timely manner, but his pricing was more than reasonable; not to mention the work was flawless. Will always choose CHC in the future.

Ethan and the team were nothing but complete professionals. Not only did they complete a thorough check on all of my systems, Ethan also made it a point to come back super quick to repair the one problem that he found. Just in time too, it's getting cold in the 'burgh!

Ethan came to fix my furnace and in an hour or two the heat was back on. He was professional, kind and pleasant. Best of all, he knew what to do. He explained things to me, showing respect and courtesy. Complete Home Comfort saved Christmas! I would recommend them to anyone.

The experience I had with Complete Home Comfort was great. Ethan was very knowledgeable and guided me through my new minisplit setup for the 3rd floor of my home. Great price, great communication, and great quality! Would definitely recommend!

Wish there were more stars up there. You have an exceptional employee! I called Ethan at 10am about my boiler. He returned call and came to the house by 1:30, after another job across town. Diagnosed, explained the problem, put in parts, adjusted heat-done by 3:30.

He is prompt, efficient, very easy to talk to and now his name (and your company) is in all my friend's, neighbor's and family's lists of who to call-first and only! Thanks. CHC and Ethan literally made my day.

If you are looking for an honest heating and cooling technician that knows his stuff, look no further. In my many years of home ownership I have come across many technicians. Ethan from CHC is by far one of the best. Honest-check, fair price-check, all about customer service-check.

I had 3 large "reputable" companies look at my furnace, $120-$200 each service call, ALL told me I needed a new $6500 furnace. Ethan came in, fixed the problem, for under $500. Do yourself a favor, call Ethan. Don't keep scrolling. You will be happy.

I can't say enough good things about Complete Home Comfort. We had a mini-split installed, and Ethan was fantastic. He was a true professional from start to finish, handling everything from the initial consultation to the final cleanup. His work was top-notch, and he provided truly "full-service" care. I highly recommend him and the company!
